titleZh: 修订后中国公司法下的员工参与公司治理
titleEn: Employees' Participation in Corporate Governance under the Revised Chinese Company Law
abstractZh: 聚焦新《公司法》下职工董事、审计委员会替代监事会等制度变化，适合与公司治理、职工参与和董监高职责专题联读。
abstractEn: Focuses on employee representation, audit committee alternatives, and related governance changes introduced by the revised Chinese Company Law.
